# 🛠️ Build an Admin Dashboard

The OoS platform offers many administrative endpoints and a front-end for
managing providers, users, and settings. Our site has no admin interface.

Goals:

- Create an `/admin` section in the UI accessible only to teachers/admins.
- Provide CRUD operations on activities, providers, and user accounts.
- Display system statistics (number of signups, active activities, etc.).

This centralizes management and provides oversight for school staff.
